full_text:
Zhou Jing 周旌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Jing (周旌)was born in Pei. Part of Wang Fen’s plot in 188 to kidnap Emperor Ling. Cao Cao refused to be involved. Zhou Jing was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
